## Person

**Name:** Mohammad Abir Abbas
**Role:** Creative Technologist & AI Architect
**Location:** Ajman, UAE — available across GCC
**Available:** Q3 2026
**Email:** abir.abbas@proton.me
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/abir-abbas
**GitHub:** https://github.com/mdabir1203
**Medium:** https://medium.com/@mdabir1203 (325K+ global readers)

## Summary

Mohammad Abir Abbas is an AI Architect and Creative Technologist based in Ajman, UAE. He deploys AI agent workflows, process automation systems, and cross-cultural GTM strategies that deliver measurable ROI — specialising in GCC enterprise markets. He is the co-founder of Deep Blue Digital and currently a Creative Technology Advisor at Wavelink, building smart NFC networking infrastructure.

## Expertise & Skills

- AI Agent Workflows (AutoGPT, Langchain, GPT-4)
- Process Automation & Systems Design
- React / React Native, Rust, C, C++
- Network Security & Vulnerability Scanning
- Cross-cultural GTM — 13 countries, GCC focus
- GDPR-compliant product delivery

## Key Projects

### AbayaTrack (GCC Manufacturing)
End-to-end production visibility system deployed at Famous Ladies Gowns Tailoring LLC (GCC abaya factory). Mobile time-tracking per unit, real-time bottleneck detection. Results: +38% production output, −30% cycle time, 92% on-time delivery, zero additional hires.

### Wavelink (Current)
Smart NFC digital business card platform. One tap, zero paper, GDPR-compliant. GTM Strategy, Pipeline Design, Process Optimization.

### SmartSwap — AI Personalization Layer (MIT Hacknation 2026 — Next Best)
Drop-in client-side intent engine for e-commerce. Reads URL signals (UTM, referrer, campaign tags), scores visitors against 7 behavioral personas in <50ms — no backend required. Dynamically swaps hero images, headlines, CTAs. Includes frustration detection (rage clicks, exit intent). Live: https://smartswap.lovable.app/

### RedAGPT (Redis Side Quest Winner 2024)
Open-source AutoGPT + Langchain toolkit for AI-driven network vulnerability scanning. Autonomous prompt chains for home/office network security testing; severity-ranked remediation reports. https://github.com/shamantechnology/RedAGPT

### Deep Blue Digital (2024)
Co-founder. Deployed Engaze.ai integration achieving 40% faster payment processing for 50+ sellers. AI-driven marketing automation cut Customer Acquisition Cost by 30%.

## Recognition

- Redis Side Quest Winner — RedAGPT (2024)
- MIT Hacknation 2026 Next Best — SmartSwap
